subcodes.title: Words spoken at Unitarian conference in Boston, 1912-05-22
subcodes.first_line: Creation is the expression of motion. Motion is life. A moving object is a living object
subcodes.first_line_orig: امشب من تازه از راه رسیده ام خسته ام با وجود این مختصری صحبت میدارم زیرا جمع
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @unity; oneness of humanity, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @relativity of religious truth
